title: skyblock.net textures
description:
makes some textures on skyblock.net more viewable such as the pots/keys and some other rare items on the server 
will need cit to use tho
body:
makes pots and keys that are voter, common, rare, epic and legenday pot/key named have a colour
also changes other rares such as: bouquet of roses, anniversary/independence/valentines fireworks, rabbit food, hard boiled egg, create a skyblock book, and best thing of all it makes the crate pickaxes have a blue handle and normal ones arnt changed so you can tell them apart

also the axolotl's are the coloured correctly in the bucket in your hand


does work with other servers too but made for skyblock.net

will need [CIT resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) for it to work tho

there is also a krispy kreme if you rename a pumpkin pie
